source: ops/stack_viz plus Agent Brain operating model

required_layers.label: Sources
required_layers.why: Raw mooring-provider, NOAA, CenCOOS, local history, satellite, and driver inputs.

required_layers.label: Bronze
required_layers.why: Source registry, raw snapshots, mirrors, and ingestion logs.

required_layers.label: Silver
required_layers.why: QC, masks, deterministic splits, and leakage controls.

required_layers.label: Training
required_layers.why: Continual learner, MoE, NeuralForecast, latent models, and GPU runs.

required_layers.label: Evaluation
required_layers.why: Walk-forward CV, metrics, uncertainty, seasonal-naive and XGBoost comparisons.

required_layers.label: Gold
required_layers.why: Forecast predictions, metrics, manifests, and publishable artifacts.

required_layers.label: Claim Gate
required_layers.why: Promotion matrix, claim boundaries, release/evidence gates.

required_layers.label: Agents
required_layers.why: Codex, Claude, Gemini, Qwen/Ollama roles, locks, and ownership.

required_layers.label: Agent Brain
required_layers.why: Invariants, lessons, rejected ideas, preflight, and operating loop.

required_layers.label: Traffic/GPU Guard
required_layers.why: Task locks, VRAM admission, run_safe, and next safe action.

required_layers.label: Sentinel
required_layers.why: Background completion/alert state for long jobs.

anti_bloat_rule: Use this registry to check coverage. Do not add a new dashboard panel unless it closes a missing required layer or answers the next-safe-action question.
